capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a privileged access management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise PAM service exists

questions.prompt: Is the privileged access management service reviewed at least quarterly to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the PAM service is reviewed on a regular cadence

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy a PAM system to manage privileged accounts?
questions.intent: Evaluate PAM system deployment
questions.evaluation_focus: PAM system deployed for privileged accounts

questions.prompt: Does the PAM solution manage privileged accounts enterprise-wide for applications, endpoints, and network systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate enterprise-wide PAM coverage

questions.prompt: Does the PAM solution automate privileged user lifecycle and access (onboarding, rotation, offboarding)?
questions.intent: Evaluate PAM lifecycle automation
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated PAM user lifecycle and access

questions.prompt: Is PAM solution configuration reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular PAM configuration review

questions.prompt: Is the PAM solution integrated with applications, endpoint devices, and network devices to broker privileged sessions?
questions.intent: Evaluate PAM integration with enterprise assets
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with applications, endpoints, and network devices

questions.prompt: Does the PAM platform support just-in-time privileged access (time-bound elevation rather than permanent admin rights)?
questions.intent: Evaluate JIT capability in PAM platform
questions.evaluation_focus: Just-in-time privileged access capability in PAM platform

questions.prompt: Does the PAM service have formalized documented KPIs and KRIs?
questions.intent: Evaluate documented PAM KPIs and KRIs

questions.prompt: Are PAM KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular PAM KPI review

questions.prompt: Do KPIs measure the ratio of standing versus just-in-time privileged access?
questions.intent: Evaluate standing vs JIT privilege metrics
questions.evaluation_focus: Standing versus just-in-time privileged access metrics

questions.prompt: Do KPIs track privileged session recording coverage?
questions.intent: Evaluate session recording coverage metrics

questions.prompt: Do KPIs identify orphaned or unused privileged accounts?
questions.intent: Evaluate orphaned privileged account metrics

questions.prompt: Is there a formalized documented process for providing privileged access to application resources?
questions.intent: Evaluate formalized application privileged access process

questions.prompt: Is there a formalized documented process for privileged escalation to endpoint resources (for example admin on laptops and desktops)?
questions.intent: Evaluate formalized endpoint privileged access process

questions.prompt: Is the privileged access process unified and applicable across application and endpoint assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate unified privileged access across asset types
questions.evaluation_focus: Unified privileged access across application and endpoint assets

questions.prompt: Is privileged access provisioning automated with self-requesting portals and approval workflows?
questions.intent: Evaluate automated privileged access portals

questions.prompt: Is privileged access provisioning reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate regular privileged access process review

questions.prompt: Does policy require minimizing standing (always-on) privileged access in favor of just-in-time elevation?
questions.intent: Evaluate policy to minimize standing privilege
questions.evaluation_focus: Policy to minimize standing privileged access

questions.prompt: Is privileged elevation time-bound and approval-gated (request, approve, use, auto-expire)?
questions.intent: Evaluate time-bound approval-gated elevation

questions.prompt: Are ephemeral privileged sessions automatically revoked when the time window expires?
questions.intent: Evaluate automatic revocation of ephemeral sessions
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic revocation of ephemeral privileged sessions

questions.prompt: Is break-glass privileged access available with enhanced logging and post-incident review?
questions.intent: Evaluate break-glass privileged access controls
questions.evaluation_focus: Break-glass privileged access with enhanced logging

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated PAM service manager responsible for privileged accounts—not the IAM engineer or identity custodian alone?
questions.intent: Evaluate dedicated PAM service manager

questions.prompt: Is privileged account ownership separated from IAM engineering and general identity store administration?
questions.intent: Evaluate separation from IAM ownership
questions.evaluation_focus: Separation from IAM engineer or custodian ownership

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging privileged account activity and lifecycle changes to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate documented PAM logging to SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented PAM activity logging to SOC

questions.prompt: Is privileged account activity logged securely to the SOC? (This is distinct from authentication logs or credential creation logs.)
questions.intent: Evaluate secure PAM activity logging
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure privileged account logging to SOC

questions.prompt: Are privileged sessions recorded (keystroke, command, or screen) with replay capability for investigation?
questions.intent: Evaluate privileged session recording

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to privileged accounts captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate capture of dynamic privileged account changes
questions.evaluation_focus: Dynamic privileged account changes to SOC

questions.prompt: Does the SOC detect anomalous privileged activity (for example off-hours elevation or unusual command patterns)?
questions.intent: Evaluate anomaly detection for privileged activity
